scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/zproof-engine && npm run build --workspace apps/zproof-app
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/zproof-engine && npm run lint --workspace apps/zproof-app
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace apps/zproof-engine && npm run test --workspace apps/zproof-app
